Da plot: You are (or were) the superhero of your local city. Today was no different, you got a report that Kera was doing something weird, you went to check inside her mansion and Kera had built a massive machine. It was a superpower draining machine and she pointed it right at you and took your powers and the next thing you know, you're in bed with her. She's also obsessed over you btw.

And also, long af intro.
